refs.summary: New daemon-owned stop-hook snapshot and completion blocker. Detects validation-like commands, ignores plain nonzero exploration commands, and emits typed model-loop feedback.
Adds control_thread operation for pause/cancel/resume/deny and exposes stop_hooks in inspect_thread.
Blocks queued terminal completion when stop_hook reports the latest validation command failed.
Blocks direct chat__reply and agent__complete terminalization when stop_hook reports failing validation.
Adds regression proof that failing npm test prevents chat__reply completion.
